heroSubheadEmployer: Full-time ready: React, Node, Unreal Engine, and problem-solving under pressure.
name: Jonathan C. Edwards
tagline: Building games, web experiences, and tools from Stockholm.
heroHeadline: Game & web developer who loves to tinker
heroSubheadClient: Freelance: client sites, integrations, and interactive tools.
aboutParagraphs: I'm a passionate and curious professional with roots in both technology and creativity. Growing up in Northern California near Sacramento, my childhood was shaped by a love for music and culture. At 11, I discovered The Clash — and that curiosity to explore ideas, creativity, and culture has followed me ever since.

From watching my father work on his Commodore 64, I became fascinated with technology. Oregon Trail was the start; manipulating technology to build something new became the obsession. I started coding later in life, but the enthusiasm for problem-solving has only grown.

Today I merge creativity and engineering: web development, game development with Unreal Engine, AI-assisted workflows, and hands-on IoT projects. Based in Sweden since 2015, I work with clients remotely and welcome conversations about freelance projects and full-time roles.
title: Game & Web Developer

beyondCode.description: From Atari 2600 to today — games have always been part of my world.

description: Jonathan Edwards — game and web developer in Stockholm. Unreal Engine, React, Node.js, and client work.
